title: Smart Irrigation System
description: An IoT-based automated irrigation system using soil moisture sensors and weather data to optimize water usage for smallholder farmers.
fullDescription: Designed and built a precision irrigation system that uses Arduino-based soil moisture sensors, weather API integration, and a custom Node.js dashboard. The system reduced water waste by 35% and increased crop yield for pilot farms in Eastern Uganda. The hardware communicates via LoRa to a Raspberry Pi gateway that relays data to a cloud backend.
highlights: Reduced water consumption by 35% in pilot farms
Deployed LoRa mesh network covering 2km radius
Built real-time monitoring dashboard with alerts

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A dynamic portfolio website with an admin dashboard for managing content, built with Express.js and vanilla JavaScript.
fullDescription: A fully dynamic portfolio website featuring a password-protected admin panel, drag-and-drop content reordering, testimonials integration with Google Sheets, and SEO optimization. The site uses a JSON-based data layer for content management and supports real-time updates without page reloads.
highlights: Dynamic testimonials from Google Sheets API
